header.service: DEMO — UC San Diego Staff Performance Appraisal (SPA)
header.scope: Setting expectations → Signed appraisal filed in personnel file
header.stages: Setting expectations → Doing the work and gathering evidence → Writing my self-appraisal → Getting the draft and talking it through → Review, comments, and HR clearance → Signing and closing

steps.step: Setting expectations — Review and update the job description
steps.trigger: Cycle opens May 1; leader begins planning
steps.rule: Job description must reflect current duties before standards are set
steps.whatGoesWrong: Job description left stale, so standards are set against duties the employee no longer does (FR-05)

steps.step: Setting expectations — Set or revise standards and goals with the employee
steps.rule: Standards documented at the start of the cycle
steps.whatGoesWrong: Meeting skipped or goals left vague, weakening the eventual rating basis

steps.step: Writing my self-appraisal — Employee completes the self-appraisal
steps.trigger: Reminder ~30–60 days before the formal meeting
steps.rule: Optional but strongly encouraged; deadline set by the leader
steps.whatGoesWrong: Skipped because it is optional; leader loses the employee's own account (FR-02)

steps.step: Getting the draft — Leader drafts the appraisal
steps.trigger: Self-appraisal submitted, or its deadline passes
steps.rule: Incorporate the self-appraisal when available; no AI-generated ratings
steps.whatGoesWrong: Volume crunch (many reports, one deadline) lowers draft quality (FR-07)

steps.step: Getting the draft — Hold the appraisal meeting
steps.whatGoesWrong: Rushed or merged with sign-off when pressed against the deadline

steps.step: Review and comments — Employee adds comments
steps.rule: At least five business days to finalize employee comments
steps.whatGoesWrong: Fewer than five days given when up against June 15 (FR-06)

steps.step: HR clearance — Move the appraisal to 'HR Review'
steps.trigger: Leader is satisfied the draft is final (D-05)
steps.rule: In 'HR Review' the employee can no longer edit; HR, leader, and indirect supervisors can view
steps.waitTime: Days to weeks during the late-cycle flood
steps.whatGoesWrong: Sits with no status surfaced to the employee; reads as a black box (FR-03, H-02)

steps.step: Signing and closing — Collect signatures, provide copy, and file
steps.who: People leader, employee (business officer assists routing)
steps.rule: Provide a copy to the employee and file the signed document in the personnel file
steps.whatGoesWrong: Signatures chased one by one by email; close slips past COB June 15 (FR-01, FR-04, H-05)
